---
title: "Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape"
---

# Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape

Range: `0113-0249`.

## Completion

| Status   | Count |
| -------- | ----- |
| authored | 137   |

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                   | Completion | Summary                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ----- | -------------------------------------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 0113  | [abstract class](#rune-0113)           | authored   | `abstract class` is a language and semantics rune for make meaning, syntax, and interpretation rules inspectable; use it when the artifact needs the abstract class obligation named before work proceeds.                     |
